basic_details.job_title: RCFL Operator Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 188 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers Limited (RCFL), a Mini Ratna Category-I PSU
basic_details.short_information: RCFL Recruitment 2026: Get the latest RCFL recruitment notification 2026 for 188 Operator (Chemical) Trainee vacancies under the Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers Limited (RCFL), a Mini Ratna Category-I Public Sector Undertaking. The online application process starts on 11th April 2026 and the last date to apply online is 12th May 2026. Find RCFL Operator Trainee vacancies at various locations on the official website www.rcfltd.com. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming RCFL Operator Trainee Recruitment 2026" notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Also know the direct

important_dates.computer based online test date: To be notified on RCFL/IBPS website

application_fee.details: Candidates are required to pay a non-refundable application fee (as applicable). The fee must be paid online only. Fee paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.

age_limit.details: Age limit is calculated as on the crucial date i.e. 01-02-2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India guidelines for reserved categories. | Note: Age relaxation as per Government of India guidelines. Category once submitted cannot be changed.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the crucial date i.e. 01-02-2026. Only Indian Citizens are eligible to apply. The educational qualification must be full time and regular course from a recognized University/Institution. Candidates in final year of Graduation/Post Graduation are not eligible to apply. | Educational Qualification (Any One of the Following): | Minimum Percentage Requirement: | Important Notes: | Only full time and regular courses are acceptable. Distance/Correspondence/Part-time courses are not eligible Candidates in final year of Graduation/Post Graduation are not eligible Reserved category candidates must submit valid Caste/EWS/Disability certificate in prescribed proforma

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 22,000/- per month (consolidated, for 6 months training period)
salary_details.hostel accommodation: Free of cost (on sharing basis during training)
salary_details.sports complex: Free access to Sports Complex facility
salary_details.hra (house rent allowance): 30% for Class A cities (subject to company accommodation availability)
salary_details.details: Selected candidates will undergo 6 months training and will receive consolidated stipend during training period. After successful completion of training, candidates will be absorbed in Grade II-(A6) with attractive salary and benefits. | During 6-Month Training Period: | After Successful Completion of Training (Regular Employment): | Additional Benefits: | Company accommodation (subject to availability) in lieu of HRA Performance Related Pay (PRP) Free Medical facility for self & dependents Gratuity Contributory Provident Fund (CPF) Accident Insurance Social Security Schemes as applicable

selection_process: Type of Questions Objective Type Multiple Choice Questions
Negative Marking Yes (as per IBPS pattern)
Subjects Covered Technical Knowledge, General Awareness, Reasoning, Numerical Ability, English Language etc.
Nature Qualifying only (marks not counted for final selection)
The selection process for RCFL Operator Trainee Recruitment 2026 consists of Computer Based Online Test
and Pre-Employment Medical Examination. Final selection is based on marks obtained in Online Test only (100% weightage). Skill Test is qualifying in nature.
Computer Based Online Objective Type Test
Provisionally shortlisted candidates will be called for Document Scrutiny in the ratio of 1:7 (Vacancy : Candidates) All original documents along with self-attested copies must be produced

Final selection is based on marks obtained in Computer Based Online Test only 100% weightage is given to Online Test marks Skill Test is qualifying in nature only Selected candidates must undergo Pre-Employment Medical Examination
Note: Mere fulfilling minimum eligibility criteria does not entitle candidate for selection. RCF Ltd reserves the right to cancel/modify the advertisement without assigning any reason.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official RCFL website (www.rcfltd.com) → HR → RECRUITMENT → APPLY ONLINE or through IBPS portal. No other mode of application will be accepted. The online portal is active from 11-04-2026 to 12-05-2026.
Steps to Apply Online:
Step 1: Visit Official Website - Go to www.rcfltd.com → HR → RECRUITMENT → APPLY ONLINE or directly visit IBPS Portal for RCFL
Step 2: Register - Register with Name, Contact details & Email-id to generate Provisional Registration Number & Password
Step 3: Login - Login using generated Registration Number and Password
Step 4: Fill Application Form - Fill all details in the application form accurately: Personal details Educational qualifications Category details Contact details
Personal details
Educational qualifications
Category details
Contact details

Step 5: Upload Documents - Upload scanned copies of: Recent passport-size photograph (as per specifications) Signature (as per specifications) Left Thumb Impression (as per specifications) Hand-written Declaration (as per format given in notification) Required documents in PDF format
Recent passport-size photograph (as per specifications)
Signature (as per specifications)
Left Thumb Impression (as per specifications)
Hand-written Declaration (as per format given in notification)
Required documents in PDF format
Step 6: Pay Application Fee - Pay application fee online (wherever applicable) through available payment modes
Step 7: Submit Application - Review all details carefully and submit the application
Step 8: Take Printout - Take printout of application form and e-receipt for future reference
Important Notes:
Keep email ID & mobile number active till completion of recruitment process
All communications will be sent via email/SMS only
Category once submitted cannot be changed
Documents to be Uploaded at the Time of Online Application:
Recent passport-size coloured photograph (as per specifications in notification)
Signature (scanned as per specifications)
Left Thumb Impression (scanned as per specifications)
Hand-written Declaration in English (as per format in notification)
Documents to be Produced at the Time of Document Scrutiny (on being called):
Printout of online application form
Valid Call Letter
Original Photo Identity Proof (Aadhaar Card/PAN Card/Passport/Driving License/Voter ID etc.)

Educational qualification certificates: 10th certificate and mark sheet (for date of birth proof) 12th certificate and mark sheet (if applicable) B.Sc. (Chemistry) degree and mark sheets with Physics as subject (Option 1) Diploma certificate and mark sheets (Option 2 & 3) NCVT certificate in AO(CP) Trade (Option 1) BOAT training completion certificate (Option 2)
10th certificate and mark sheet (for date of birth proof)
12th certificate and mark sheet (if applicable)
B.Sc. (Chemistry) degree and mark sheets with Physics as subject (Option 1)
Diploma certificate and mark sheets (Option 2 & 3)
NCVT certificate in AO(CP) Trade (Option 1)
BOAT training completion certificate (Option 2)
Category certificates (SC/ST/OBC-NCL/EWS) in prescribed proforma issued by competent authority
PwBD certificate (if applicable) issued by competent authority
Ex-Serviceman discharge certificate (if applicable)
Certificate for children/family members of victims of 1984 riots (if applicable)
NOC from current employer (for candidates employed in Government/PSU)
Any other relevant documents as mentioned in notification
Apply Online at: https://ibpsreg.ibps.in/rcflfeb26/
important_instructions: Only Indian Citizens are eligible to apply Age and qualification criteria calculated as on crucial date i.e. 01-02-2026 Candidates in final year of Graduation/Post Graduation are not eligible Only full time and regular courses are acceptable. Distance/Correspondence/Part-time courses not eligible Minimum percentage requirement: 55% for General/EWS/OBC (NCL), 50% for SC/ST in last year/aggregate of last two semesters Category once submitted cannot be changed at any stage Reserved category candidates must submit valid Caste/EWS/Disability certificate in prescribed proforma Candidates employed in Government/PSUs must submit NOC at Skill Test stage Application fee is non-refundable under any circumstances Keep email ID and mobile number active till completion of recruitment process All communications will be sent via email/SMS only - no hard copy will be sent by post Document Scrutiny will be conducted in the ratio of 1:7 (Vacancy : Candidates) Skill Test is qualifying in nature - minimum 60 marks required for General/EWS/OBC (NCL), 55 marks for SC/ST Final selection is based on Computer Based Online Test marks only (100% weightage) Selected candidates must undergo Pre-Employment Medical Examination and must be found medically fit Mere fulfilling minimum eligibility criteria does not entitle candidate for selection Selected candidates will undergo 6 months training and will receive consolidated stipend of Rs. 22,000/- per month during training Hostel accommodation/quarter on sharing basis will be provided free of cost during training period After successful completion of training, candidates will be absorbed in Grade II-(A6) with pay scale Rs. 22,000 - 60,000 The number of vacancies is subject to variation based on business requirements RCF Ltd reserves the right to cancel/modify the advertisement without assigning any reason Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification Any dispute arising out of this advertisement shall be subject to the jurisdiction of Mumbai courts only Candidates are advised to visit the official website www.rcfltd.com and IBPS website regularly for all updates regarding exam date, admit card, results, and other notifications

faq.question: Q1. What is RCFL Operator Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: RCFL Operator Trainee Recruitment 2026 is a government job notification released by Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers Limited for eligible candidates. A total of 188 Operator Trainee vacancies have been announced under this recruitment. Interested applicants can apply online through the official website rcfltd.com within the given dates.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in RCFL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 188 vacancies have been announced for the post of Operator (Chemical) Trainee. These posts are offered under Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers Limited for training and regular absorption. This recruitment provides a strong opportunity for candidates in the chemical and engineering field.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for RCFL Operator Trainee 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a B.Sc (Chemistry), Diploma in Chemical Engineering, or equivalent qualification as specified in the notification. Additional requirements include minimum marks criteria and NCVT/Apprenticeship training where applicable. Applicants must carefully check all qualification conditions before applying online.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for RCFL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 30 years for unreserved category candidates as on the cut-off date. Age relaxation is provided as 33 years for OBC and 35 years for SC/ST candidates. Additional relaxation is applicable for Ex-Servicemen and eligible special categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for RCFL Operator Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹700 for General, EWS, and OBC (NCL) candidates. SC, ST, female candidates, and Ex-Servicemen are exempted from paying any fee. The payment must be completed online during the application process.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for RCFL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Computer-Based Online Test followed by document verification and a skill test. The skill test is qualifying in nature and candidates must secure minimum required marks. Final selection is based mainly on online test performance.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for RCFL Operator Trainee post?
faq.answer: During training, selected candidates will receive a stipend of ₹22,000 per month along with hostel and medical facilities. After successful training, candidates are absorbed in Pay Scale ₹22,000–60,000 with additional allowances. The total gross salary can reach approximately ₹47,800 per month.

faq.question: Q8. What is the last date to apply for RCFL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for RCFL Operator Trainee Recruitment 2026 is 12 May 2026. Candidates must complete registration and fee payment before the deadline. Applications submitted after the closing date will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for RCFL Operator Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official website rcfltd.com by filling out the application form. They must register, upload required documents, pay the fee (if applicable), and submit the form. A printout of the application should be kept for future reference.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection weightage in RCFL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The final selection is mainly based on marks obtained in the Computer-Based Online Test with 100% weightage. The skill test is only qualifying in nature and document verification is mandatory. Candidates must also clear the medical examination after selection stages.
